solves.essence: Generate all combinations of k numbers from 1 to n using recursive backtracking
solves.time_complexity: O(C(n, k)) — where C(n, k) is the number of combinations of n items taken k at a time, because we generate all possible combinations
solves.title: Combinations

solves.essence: Iterate through all pairs of numbers to find the target sum
solves.time_complexity: O(n^2) — due to the nested loops iterating through the array
solves.title: Two Sum

solves.essence: Convert string to zigzag pattern and read line by line
solves.time_complexity: O(n) — where n is the length of the string, because we are iterating over the string once
solves.title: Zigzag Conversion

solves.essence: Iterate through the string from the end to find the length of the last word
solves.time_complexity: O(n) — where n is the length of the string, as we potentially iterate through the entire string once
solves.title: Length of Last Word
Trapping Rain Water
solves.essence: Calculate trapped water by finding minimum of left and right max heights for each position
solves.time_complexity: O(n) — where n is the number of bars in the elevation map, as we make three passes through the array
